name: ym-os-quantization

FRONTIER_OPEN is preserved: no Uniform LSI proof, no observable-gradient proof, no centering/mean-control proof, no Herbst proof, no Laplace-to-even-moment proof, no product-moment proof, no terminal subgaussian theorem proof, no OS-positive measure construction, no bridge target marked PROVED, no bridge target marked CONDITIONAL_CLOSED, and no Yang-Mills closure is claimed.
